zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil Chabbonare於大約1272年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根高維爾時，她的父親William Chabbonare32歲，母親Sybil de Herefordshire40歲。她和Richard de La Bere至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1308年在英國威爾斯享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil Chabbonare于大约1272年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根高維爾时，她的父亲William Chabbonare32岁，母亲Sybil de Herefordshire40岁。她和Richard de La Bere至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1308年在英国威尔斯享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil Chabbonare was born about 1272, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, William Chabbonare, was 32 and her mother, Sybil de Herefordshire, was 40. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Richard de La Bere. She died about 1308, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Woebley Castle, Gowerton, Glamorgan, Wal: Gowerton, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil Chabbonare est née environ 1272, à Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, William Chabbonare, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Herefordshire, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Richard de La Bere. Elle est décédée environ 1308, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil Chabbonare um 1272 in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Chabbonare 32 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Herefordshire 40. Sie hatte mit Richard de La Bere mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1308 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ht.Woebley Castle, Gowerton, Glamorgan, Wal: Gowerton, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Chabbonare è nata il circa 1272 nel Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, William Chabbonare, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Herefordshire, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Richard de La Bere. Morì circa 1308, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil Chabbonareが約1272年にウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルで生まれた時，父William Chabbonareは32歳，母Sybil de Herefordshireは40歳であった。彼女はRichard de La Bereとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1308年にイギリスウェールズで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Chabbonare(이)가 대략 1272년 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Chabbonare(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Herefordshire(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Richard de La Bere(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1308년 영국 웨일스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Chabbonare nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, William Chabbonare, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Herefordshire, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Richard de La Bere. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1308, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil Chabbonare родилась около 1272 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени William Chabbonare было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Herefordshire, 40. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Richard de La Bere. Она умерла около 1308 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Richard de La Bere.
